sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70512" key="neurostro/fos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νευρο-στρόφος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n70512.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tightener of the strings</tr_> of a musical instrument, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0530.tlg006:12:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Gaur.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
